commit.message:
feat: Lehrer-Analytics Dashboard mit Fach-Übersicht, Heatmap und Warnsystem

Dashboard hat jetzt zwei Tabs: Übersicht (bestehend) und Analytics (neu).
Analytics zeigt: Fach-Durchschnitte als Balkendiagramm, Schüler×Fächer
Heatmap mit Farbkodierung (grün/gelb/rot), Warnsystem für Schüler mit
abfallendem Trend oder schwachem Durchschnitt, Leistungsentwicklung pro
Fach über Zeit, und Schüler-Detailansicht per Klick.
Backend: results-API liefert jetzt auch result_details (strengths/weaknesses).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix strategy bugs, re-evaluate, keep 9 profitable strategies

Root cause analysis of 3 disabled strategies:

1. swing_pullback (24% → 27.5% after fix, still losing):
   - Bug: volume filter was INVERTED (rejected normal volume, accepted surges)
   - Fix: changed from vr>0.9 to vr>1.3 (reject volume surges, not declines)
   - Still losing because pullback detection lacks bounce confirmation
   - DISABLED: needs fundamental redesign with price reversal detection

2. stage2_breakout (22% → 21.1%, still losing):
   - Bug: SL at base_low (150-day low) = 15-20% risk = too wide
   - Fix: SL at 2x ATR below entry, max 7% (Minervini rule)
   - Still losing because 150 SMA cross happens too often without real breakout
   - DISABLED: needs relative volume + institutional buying confirmation

3. mean_reversion (9.5% → 0% on 3 trades):
   - Bug: target was moving BB middle band (drifts away in trends)
   - Bug: no reversal confirmation (bought falling knives)
   - Fix: fixed target (1.5x ATR), RSI must be rising (reversal confirmed)
   - Now too selective — only 3 trades in 180 days, all lost
   - DISABLED: needs more nuanced entry (multi-candle reversal pattern)

Final: 9 active strategies, 619 trades, 51.9% win, PnL=+₹13.6K
Code for disabled strategies remains for future improvement.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
ウェブサイト最適化：SEO・パフォーマンス・ユーザー体験を全面改善

## 主な変更内容

### SEO最適化
- 完全なmeta tags追加（description, keywords, Open Graph, Twitter Card）
- Schema.org構造化データ追加（JSON-LD形式）
- sitemap.xmlとrobots.txt作成
- canonical URL設定

### PWA対応
- manifest.json作成
- アプリアイコン設定
- theme-color設定

### パフォーマンス最適化
- CSS/JSリソースのpreload追加
- JavaScriptにdefer属性追加
- DNS prefetch設定

### ユーザー体験向上
- ダークモード完全実装（自動検出 + 手動切替）
- トップに戻るボタン追加
- テーマ切替ボタン追加
- localStorage でテーマ設定保存

### アクセシビリティ改善
- ARIA属性追加（role, aria-label, aria-labelledby）
- キーボードナビゲーション対応強化
- スクリーンリーダー対応改善

## 技術詳細
- 新規ファイル：manifest.json, sitemap.xml, robots.txt
- 更新ファイル：index.html, memo.html, main.css, main.js
- CSS変数によるテーマ管理
- prefers-color-scheme メディアクエリ対応

🤖 Generated with Claude Code

fix(migrations): quote column refs in partial indexes and CHECK constraints

UpdateCustomer migration: CUSTOMER/CUSTOMER_HISTORY/CUSTOMER_CONTACT are
createTable() tables with lowercase quoted columns. Fix:
- WHERE deleted_at → WHERE "deleted_at"
- WHERE primary_contact → WHERE "primary_contact"
- CHECK (change_type ...) → CHECK ("change_type" ...)
- CHECK (classification ...) → CHECK ("classification" ...)

supabase.auth.admin.inviteUserByEmail() is unreliable from browser

- mcp_server: local fallback uses process_memory(skip_reflect=True) for
  Connect→Store pipeline instead of direct store.add

  passthrough (ttl_days, shared, confidence, source_session, etc.)

  pipeline integration, async behavior, error handling, daemon threads

  to match new async pipeline behavior

- IntroAnimation: removed layout animation from wrapper to fix S-curve on mobile slogan; slogan now slides straight down (y:16→0) instead of S-shaped path

- Terms: full upgrade with 13 articles, service table (RADAR/CORE/FLASH), IP policy, liability limits, dispute resolution

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix persistent SSL drops by switching to NullPool for Supabase PgBouncer

Supabase uses PgBouncer in transaction mode (port 6543) which drops
connections after each transaction. SQLAlchemy's connection pool was
caching these dead connections, causing SSL errors on reuse.

Fix: Switch to NullPool so each request gets a fresh connection and
PgBouncer handles all pooling. Also add TCP keepalive settings to
prevent idle connection drops.

commit.message:
Implement DESIGN_PROTOTYPE.jsx design faithfully

Layout & structure:
- max_width: 930px → 1100px to match prototype
- home.liquid: add emoji section titles, keep full-width body rendering

Navbar:
- Glassmorphism bg (rgba 0.88 + backdrop-filter blur 12px)
- Gradient "ARI Lab" brand text + ::after "KAIST" subtext via CSS
- Pill-button nav items with #eef0ff active state

Hero (about.md):
- h1 42px/800, desc 18px, .hero-buttons flex with gap

Research areas (home preview):
- .research-preview-card: NO left border, icon 32px, desc 14px
- Matches prototype home page cards exactly

Research page (projects.md):
- Vertical .research-page flex column
- .research-detail-card: borderLeft 4px, icon+title flex row, meta box

Publications (_custom.scss):
- Exact prototype card: borderRadius 12, padding 24/28, shadow-sm
- Venue in $primary/500, action buttons with hover

Members (people.md + _custom.scss):
- .avatar-emoji: gradient circle (135deg $accent→#d8dcf0) + 36px emoji
- Grid auto-fill minmax(200px), name 15px/700, role 13px

News:
- 4 real lab news items replacing template placeholders
- Table styled: date 13px/$primary/600, text 15px/#333

venues.yml:
- Added RA-L, T-RO (blue #2d3a8c), ICRA, IROS, CoRL (green #2a7a2a)
- Badge colors auto-applied by bib.liquid

CSS custom properties:

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: align SDK state serialization tests with NUM2BIN encoding

findLastOpReturn now stops at the first OP_RETURN boundary instead of
continuing into raw state bytes — fixes misidentification of 0x6a in
NUM2BIN-encoded state data as a second OP_RETURN.

Update unit tests across all 4 SDKs (TS, Go, Rust, Python) to match
the fixed-width NUM2BIN encoding: bigints as 8-byte LE sign-magnitude,
bools as raw bytes, PubKey/Addr as raw hex without push-data prefix.
Variable-length bytes type now uses push-data framing for roundtrip.

fix(migrations): move inline checks to ALTER TABLE with quoted cols for Oracle

TypeORM generates inline CHECK constraints with unquoted column names,
causing ORA-00904 since columns are stored as lowercase quoted identifiers.
Move checks to separate ALTER TABLE statements using quoted column names.

Affected: CreateMaintenanceContractTable, CreateMaintenanceContractHistoryTable

commit.message:
fix: CGTP Strategy 2 link scan always runs, not just as fallback

Featured/hero articles on CGTP's listing page sit outside the regular
article grid, so Strategy 1 misses them even when it finds other articles.
Strategy 2 (direct accao-e-luta link scan) now always supplements Strategy
1; seenUrls deduplication prevents any duplicates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Rewrite FR5a (Deck Rename): modal/prompt instead of inline edit

Root cause: blur/click race condition — clicking Save triggers blur
first, which re-renders the DOM via renderSettingsView(), destroying
the Save button before its click handler fires. The deckId is read
from a DOM attribute at handler time rather than captured in a closure.

New approach: use window.prompt() or modal dialog. The deckId is
captured in a closure at click time, and prompt is synchronous so
no DOM lifecycle race is possible.

FR5a status: REJECTED, awaiting reimplementation.
E-FR5a-01 documented in Project_Notes.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix overnight export + consumption entity warning (v0.0.14)

optimizer.py:
- Add export_allowed: list[bool] to TariffSchedule — True only during
  the configured export bonus window
- Set export LP variable upper bound to 0 outside the bonus window,
  preventing the LP from ever scheduling battery-to-grid export overnight
  or outside the user's export window regardless of standard export rate

consumption_learner.py:
- Improve warning when recorder has no stats for the consumption entity:
  explicitly explains that the entity must be a long-term statistics
  energy sensor (monotonically increasing kWh), not a daily-reset
  'today total' sensor
